entity: Kareem Abdul-Jabbar career total points = 38,387 (BBR all-time leader)

query_target.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(avg_pts * gp)) AS career_pts FROM agg_player_season WHERE player_id = 76003 AND season_type = 'Regular'

notes: Sum of avg_pts*gp from agg_player_season (regular season only). BBR's 38,387 figure is the all-time NBA record. ROUND() to drop the floating-point noise (real sum is 38387.0000...).
